item.title: Bee Well Honey Farm & Supply Inc.: Raw & Unfiltered Bee Well Wildflower Honey NET wT. 12 OZ (340g) Recall
item.company: Bee Well Honey Farm & Supply Inc.
item.brand: Bee Well Honey Farm & Supply Inc.
item.product: Raw & Unfiltered Bee Well Wildflower Honey NET wT. 12 OZ (340g)
item.summary: High sugar content. The firm was notified by the FDA that sample results were positive for a high C4 sugar content. Product details: Raw & Unfiltered Bee Well Wildflower Honey NET wT. 12 OZ (340g) UPC 8 32587 00003 2, NET WT. 22 OZ (624g) UPC 8 32587 00002 5 & NET WT. 44 OZ (1.25g) UPC 8 32587 00001 8 100% Pure Honey Bee Well Honey 909 W. Main Street Pickens, SC 29671
item.affectedPeople: Product was shipped to retailers in South Carolina.
item.remedy: Affected quantity: 13cs/36/12oz bears, 86 cs/12/22oz jars and 64cs/12/44oz jars
item.payoutAmount: Refund, replacement, correction, or disposal if stated by the official notice
